description:
The quiz assesses practical knowledge of AWS storage services, testing familiarity with S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache, and related best‑practice patterns and pitfalls. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a hands‑on, slightly playful tone that encourages learners to deepen their cloud expertise. The style is instructional yet informal, aiming to both challenge and teach.
Topics: Amazon S3, Amazon DynamoDB, Amazon Aurora, Amazon RDS, Amazon ElastiCache, AWS storage best practices, Common cloud storage pitfalls
Audience: Developers, cloud engineers, and IT professionals with basic AWS experience who want to solidify and expand their knowledge of AWS storage solutions.
